response.justification: Strong geospatial and distributed systems background with proven ability to learn multiple tech stacks, but C++ skills are significantly outdated (10+ years since last use) and recent career focus has shifted toward web and AI engineering, creating a notable ramp-up challenge for a systems programming role.
strengths: Deep geospatial expertise from founding GISCollective and building navigation/mapping platforms
Proven distributed systems experience managing millions of requests per second with low-latency async I/O at Dunnhumby
Strong testing and quality culture with TDD background and multiple custom testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: C++ experience is over 10 years old; most recent work is TypeScript/Node.js web development
No Rust experience mentioned; limited low-level systems programming in recent years
Career trajectory diverging from systems engineering toward web/AI—motivation to return to routing/infrastructure unclear

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and performance optimization experience
